changes: Reduced #arcana-board-layout-guard so it no longer overrides .board or .boardRow layout.
Removed inline style attributes from .boardFrame and #board.
Kept arcana-board.css loaded after arcana.css as the board visual source of truth.
Kept old arcana.css board rules in place for rollback safety, but they are superseded by arcana-board.css load order.
known_remaining: arcana.css still contains legacy board selectors (.board, .tile, .tile .c, old chest styles). This is not ideal, but arcana-board.css loads after it and should win. A future cleanup can remove or namespace those legacy blocks.
row connector geometry is still hard-coded to current tile height/gap.
